excerpt: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair maintained steady rates, emphasized inflation control at 2%, and highlighted tariffs as a primary inflation driver.

content.introduction: Jerome Powell's final rate decision as Fed chair maintained steady rates, emphasized inflation control at 2%, and highlighted tariffs as a primary inflation driver.
body: Fed Chairman Jerome Powell said, “We will ensure inflation remains at 2%. Tariffs are the main reason for inflation exceeding this level.”.
